title: Justice BV Nagarathna to speak at ICA Symposium on women’s leadership in arbitration
description: The Indian Council of Arbitration (ICA) will host a symposium on the theme “Where Women Lead, Justice Follows” on March 7, 2026, at the Federation House, New Delhi.The event aims to focus on gender diversity in leadership within the legal profession and the broader dispute resolution ecosystem. It will bring together members of the judiciary, senior advocates, corporate leaders, and arbitration practitioners.Venue: Room No.112, 1 Floor, Federation House, Tansen Marg, New Delhi-110 001Guest speak
